title.zh: Apereo CAS < 4.2.x 反序列化远程代码执行

description.zh: Apereo CAS 4.2.x以下版本存在反序列化漏洞，通过execution参数可触发RCE。
description.en: Apereo CAS versions below 4.2.x contain deserialization vulnerability. RCE via execution parameter.

content.zh: 分析Apereo CAS反序列化漏洞
CAS靶场搭建：从Maven仓库下载cas-server-webapp 4.1.6或4.2.7版本WAR包部署到Tomcat。
content.en: CAS lab setup: Download cas-server-webapp 4.1.6 or 4.2.7 WAR from Maven and deploy to Tomcat.

content.zh: 资产发现 - 通过404路由查看版本：
content.en: Asset discovery - view version via 404 route:

codeBlocks.code:
GET /cas/iwana404;) HTTP/1.1
Host: cas.example.com

# Response shows version in error page

content.en: Where is the deserialization entry point?

content.zh: 登录POST请求包中的execution参数是反序列化入口。攻击者可构造恶意序列化数据注入到execution参数触发RCE。
content.en: The execution parameter in login POST request is the deserialization entry point. Attackers can inject malicious serialized data to trigger RCE.

codeBlocks.code:
POST /login;jsessionid=SESSION_ID HTTP/1.1
Host: localhost:8000
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

username=admin&password=123&execution=MALICIOUS_SERIALIZED_DATA
